title: AI boom drives an 80% surge in foreign investment bids for Thailand
summary: War in the Middle East has pushed up energy costs, yet the money kept coming. “Thailand’s investment growth held steady even as the world economy faced real turbulence,” Narit said, in figures also reported by TNGlobal .
